channel.title: cacti on Scorpiosec
channel.description: Recent content in cacti on Scorpiosec

item.title: HTB: MonitorsFour
item.description: Platform: Hack The Box Link: MonitorsFour Level: Easy OS: Windows Scanning nmap -p- --open -T4 -sCV -oA nmap/MonitorsFour {TARGET_IP} Results Starting Nmap 7.95 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2026-05-20 07:57 EDT Nmap scan report for 10.129.48.141 Host is up (0.11s latency). Not shown: 65533 filtered tcp ports (no-response) Some closed ports may be reported as filtered due to --defeat-rst-ratelimit PORT STATE SERVICE VERSION 80/tcp open http nginx |_http-title: Did not follow redirect to http://monitorsfour.
